title: RBI revives FCNR(B) swap window for NRIs; can it replicate the 2013 inflow boom? Explained
summary: The RBI has revived the FCNR(B) swap window, a tool last used during the 2013 rupee crisis. Here's how the scheme works and whether it can attract fresh dollar inflows from NRIs.

title: ELSS funds see ₹650 crore outflow; are tax-saving mutual funds losing relevance?
summary: According to data released by the Association of Mutual Funds in India, ELSS funds recorded net outflows of ₹650 crore in May, marking the fifth consecutive month of redemptions this year. The category has witnessed net outflows in 13 of the past 14 months.

title: ' ₹7 lakh tax rebate was never just about saving tax': ClearTax's Archit Gupta on how it changed the way Indians invest
summary: The ₹7 lakh tax rebate from the Union Budget 2023 aimed to ease the tax burden on middle-income earners but it also led to a shift in investment patterns of salaried taxpayers. Details here.

title: How to create a balanced portfolio using core-satellite investing strategy: Meaning, allocation and benefits
summary: The core-satellite investing strategy helps you build a balanced portfolio by combining passively and actively managed funds. Through passive investing, you can invest in low-cost and stable options, while through active investing, you can explore new opportunities emerging in the market.&nbsp;

title: ITR filing AY 2026–27: Difference between ITR-1 and ITR-4 — who should file which form?
summary: ITR-1 is generally filed by salaried individuals or pensioners, while ITR-4 is meant for individuals earning income from business or profession.

title: How to file a complaint in consumer court and seek redressal — Step-by-step process explained
summary: Consumers who are unsatisfied with a product or service can file complaints in consumer courts, provided they have necessary documents and the seller refused to provide a resolution. Full details here.&nbsp;

title: Death doesn't end income tax liability: Who is responsible for paying a deceased person's tax dues?
summary: Tax obligations of a deceased taxpayer remain, requiring legal heirs to file returns and settle dues. Under the Income-tax Act, liability is limited to the estate's value, protecting heirs from personal financial burden beyond inherited assets.

title: 8th pay commission: Feedback submission, job applications and state visits — Check here for key dates and deadlines

title: Will AI take jobs? Vijay Kedia points to refrigerators, electricity and highways for answers
summary: In a post on X on 9 June, Vijay Kedia addresses the common concern that AI will take jobs. The ace investor says history suggests a different possibility. Refrigerators, electricity, highways, and the Internet created opportunities for entire ecosystems, and AI may follow the same path.&nbsp;

title: Dearness Allowance: Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari says DA announcement to come in next state Budget — What we know
summary: West Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari announced that the dearness allowance for government employees will be addressed in the upcoming state budget. Here's all the latest updates we know…

title: US stocks slump after fresh sell-off in tech stocks; Nasdaq down over 1%
summary: Wall Street's major indices declined as weakness in technology stocks and escalating US-Iran tensions overshadowed inflation data that met expectations. Investors reassessed AI-related valuations, while geopolitical risks and concerns over prolonged higher interest rates dampened overall market sent

title: Gold price crash may revive wedding demand as buying season nears
summary: Gold and silver prices witnessed a sharp correction from recent highs, raising hopes of stronger jewellery demand. Industry experts expect wedding and festive purchases to improve after Adhik Maas ends, with lower prices encouraging buyers across urban and rural markets.

title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Thursday
summary: Indian equities lost momentum after a positive start, with Nifty closing lower and broader markets declining sharply. Investor caution ahead of US inflation data, profit booking and geopolitical concerns weighed on sentiment, while FMCG and private banking stocks offered some support.

title: Market Trading Guide: Akums Drugs among 4 stock recommendations for Thursday
summary: Domestic equities ended lower amid global uncertainty and caution ahead of key US inflation data. Despite market weakness, analysts remain bullish on Akums Drugs and Aditya Birla Sun Life AMC after strong technical breakouts, rising volumes and improving momentum indicators.

title: Goldman Sachs buys CMR Green Technologies shares on listing day after strong debut
summary: Goldman Sachs India Equity Portfolio bought shares worth Rs 49.82 crore in CMR Green Technologies on its listing day, which saw a 43% premium. Despite investor optimism, analysts advise caution and partial profit booking amid high valuations.

title: Zee Entertainment to raise $241 million for stategic initiatives
summary: Zee Entertainment is all set to gather 23 billion rupees to fuel its ambitious business strategies, following a significant win in securing the broadcast rights for the 2026 FIFA World Cup in India.

title: SpaceX IPO: How Elon Musk is breaking Wall Street rules with mega issue
S&P Global revises IPO-bound Oyo parent Prism's outlook to 'Positive'
summary: S&P Global Ratings has declared a Positive outlook for Prism, suggesting a promising trajectory for OYO's parent company. This optimistic assessment comes with the expectation of substantial improvements in credit metrics and a flourishing IPO that will enhance Prism's financial standing.

title: US Stocks: US markets dips as tech declines, Middle East tensions mount
summary: U.S. stock indexes opened lower on Wednesday, continuing a selloff in technology stocks. Renewed U.S.-Iran tensions also weighed on the market, overshadowing a tame May inflation reading. The Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq all saw declines at the opening bell.

title: Urban Vault sub-leases 16K sq ft office space in Gurugram to electric ride-hailing firm Green SM
